title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 353.090 - Maintain reserves for specific purposes
text:
353.090.  Maintain reserves for specific purposes. — An urban redevelopment corporation shall establish and maintain depreciation, obsolescence, and other reserves, also surplus and other accounts, including, among others, a reserve for the payment of taxes according to recognized standard accounting practices.
(L. 1945 p. 1242 § 8)
